## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test`

## Subphase Commit Provenance (Required)

<!-- SUBPHASE_PROVENANCE
{"codename":"beelzebub","subphase":"1.2","commits":["abc1234"],"multi_commit_rationale":""}
-->

- Use one marker per implemented subphase.
- `commits` must list the exact commit hashes for that subphase.
- If `commits` has more than one hash, `multi_commit_rationale` is required and must explain why one-commit policy was not possible.
